updateNote: Day 68 12:01 PM PT refresh — Israel struck Beirut Dahieh killing Hezbollah Radwan commander Malek Ballout (first Beirut strike since April 16 ceasefire). US F/A-18 disabled Iranian tanker M/T Hasna in Gulf of Oman with cannon fire — first aircraft-disabled vessel under blockade. Trump issued ultimatum: 'much higher level' bombing if Iran rejects 14-point MOU. Araghchi met Wang Yi in Beijing. WaPo satellite imagery: 228 structures damaged at US bases. RUSI: Israel may exhaust Arrow-3 within days. Brent $102.22 (+28.1%), WTI $100.28 (+32.8%). Gas $4.536 (+44.9%). Hormuz Day 65.
